text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hmm, what to do, what to do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot a rather worried-looking Mejiro Palmer with
Daitaku Helios at a cafe in town.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't Trainer! Helios and I were just
thinking of having some tea.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
What a coinkydink that you're here too! Time to
bring the party to this cafe!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, for sure, but like...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well, they've got this dessert buffet special going
on right now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
See? They've got a sign with huge letters saying,
"Eat to your heart's content!" and everything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But that "to your heart's content" part has got me
shook. There's an angel and a devil duking it out
in my head right now...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Who's gonna win?! I mean, that mountain
of crepes looks bussin'! That angel's in for a tough
one!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
"In for a tough one"? Nah, girl, she's already
down for the count!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Uuugh! I just wanna chow down on desserts!
choice_data_list:
Let us be beguiled by the devil's persuasion
together...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Uuugh! I just wanna chow down on desserts!
choice_data_list:
Let us be beguiled by the devil's persuasion
together...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she can't give up! I can't let a sugar rush
tempt me, not now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right, bye-bye dessert buffet and hello regular
menu.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wow, talk about willpower of steel! You know
what, I'll join you in solidarity! Buffet's all yours,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I might not be able to indulge in it myself,
but seeing you dig in to the yummy sweetness'll
be good enough!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Eat enough for my bestie and me too! Avenge
that devil!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how things turned out this way, but I
end up filling up on dessert while Mejiro Palmer
manages to restrain herself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh, for real?! I mean, I'm not planning to be
in devil mode for the rest of my life or anything,
buuut...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
YOLO! Time to give in to temptation for a day!
Better flag down the waiter! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wait! The waiter's gonna actually come over!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Welp... No stoppin' this train now! Let's live it up
today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we let the devil literally sweet-talk us and
gorge ourselves on desserts...
